title: verbascum × semivulcanicum
intro: Verbascum × semivulcanicum, also known as the Hybrid Mullein, is a hybrid plant species that combines the characteristics of Verbascum thapsus and Verbascum virgineum. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Verbascum × semivulcanicum include relief from respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Verbascum × semivulcanicum are commonly used to create teas, infusions, and ointments that can be used to promote relaxation and reduce inflammation.
